Photographs are of great importance at the beginning of the orthodontic treatment process, in treatment planning and in the evaluation of post-treatment results. The professionally equipped photo room in the clinic is an integral part of this process. In the photo room, intraoral and facial profile images of patients are taken with special lighting and high-resolution equipment and digitized. These records allow the physician to make a healthier diagnosis and create a personalized treatment plan. At the same time, by documenting every stage of the treatment process, it offers patients the opportunity to see their progress clearly.
